Third quarter 2023 revenuewas up 9.3% year over year. Automotive revenue represented 20.0% of MPS's third quarter 2023 revenue compared with 17.5% inthe third quarter of 2022. Third quarter 2023 industrial revenue of $42.1 million decreased 15.3% from the second quarter of2023 due to lower sales in security and industrial meter applications. Third quarter 2023 revenue was down 28.2% year overyear. Industrial revenue represented 8.9% of our total third quarter 2023 revenue compared with 11.9% in the third quarter of2022.
